mapper.sql: ch.id, ch.student_id, ch.change_type, ch.old_status, ch.new_status, ch.old_major_id, ch.new_major_id, ch.old_grade_id, ch.new_grade_id, ch.old_class_id, ch.new_class_id, ch.effective_date, ch.reason, ch.change_status, ch.approver_id, ch.approver_name, ch.approve_time, ch.approve_opinion, ch.remark, ch.deleted, ch.create_time, ch.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, nm.major_name new_major_name, ng.grade_name new_grade_name, nc.class_name new_class_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_status_change (student_id, change_type, old_status, new_status, old_major_id, new_major_id, old_grade_id, new_grade_id, old_class_id, new_class_id, effective_date, reason, change_status, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{changeType}, #{oldStatus}, #{newStatus}, #{oldMajorId}, #{newMajorId}, #{oldGradeId}, #{newGradeId}, #{oldClassId}, #{newClassId}, #{effectiveDate}, #{reason}, #{changeStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_status_change SET change_type=#{changeType}, new_status=#{newStatus}, new_major_id=#{newMajorId}, new_grade_id=#{newGradeId}, new_class_id=#{newClassId}, effective_date=#{effectiveDate}, reason=#{reason}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0 AND change_status='PENDING'

UPDATE academic_status_change SET change_status=#{changeStatus}, approver_id=#{approverId}, approver_name=#{approverName}, approve_time=#{approveTime}, approve_opinion=#{approveOpinion}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM academic_status_change ch LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=ch.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major nm ON nm.id=ch.new_major_id AND nm.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade ng ON ng.id=ch.new_grade_id AND ng.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class nc ON nc.id=ch.new_class_id AND nc.deleted=0 WHERE ch.id=#{id} AND ch.deleted=0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_status_change ch LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=ch.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major nm ON nm.id=ch.new_major_id AND nm.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade ng ON ng.id=ch.new_grade_id AND ng.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class nc ON nc.id=ch.new_class_id AND nc.deleted=0

SELECT FROM academic_status_change ch LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=ch.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_major nm ON nm.id=ch.new_major_id AND nm.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_grade ng ON ng.id=ch.new_grade_id AND ng.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class nc ON nc.id=ch.new_class_id AND nc.deleted=0
ORDER BY ch.create_time DESC, ch.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
